title: Pattern Volume and PDF Navigation
notes: Drill Log Hole Diameter and Drilled Depth Range now appear as large, high-contrast summary callouts.
The Shot Diagram PDF opens in a closable in-app preview with Done and Share / Save PDF controls, so the canvas can be resumed without closing MITHRIL.
Shot Information now supports Default Burden and Default Spacing, and Patterns & Volume can store additional named patterns.
Selected Shot Diagram holes can be assigned to a pattern using the existing Hole, Row, Column, and All Page selection engine.
Temporary numbered pattern colors are available during Edit Holes and never print on the diagram.
The Shot Diagram report calculates estimated pattern area and bank cubic yards overall and by pattern, with missing-data warnings.
All m39.3 depth-range, diameter, ANFO-load, selection, transfer, GPS, structured condition, Quick Fill, theme, backup, and offline features remain included.
